effect.content: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

governance.preferred_form: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

rule_text: Administration messaging must use the approved wording verbatim: "LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required."
summary: Administration messaging must use exact approved wording: "LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.
